summary: Completed the final integration repair by aligning preview runtime/task references with the Group B Kubernetes resource and image names, ensuring smoke receives the preview URL, and making the overview endpoint explicitly identify mocked data.
tasks_completed: Aligned preview image default to localhost/scion-ops-new-ui-eval:latest.
Aligned Taskfile load, restart, status, logs, and control-plane rollout references to deploy/scion-ops-new-ui-eval and app.kubernetes.io/name=scion-ops-new-ui-eval.
Made /api/overview return an explicit mocked: true marker by adding it to the overview fixture and TypeScript contract.
Updated adapter and frontend fixture tests for overview mocked metadata and preview service naming.
Marked OpenSpec task 1.11 complete after running the relevant no-spend checks.
tests_run: kubectl kustomize deploy/kind/control-plane with rg checks for scion-ops-new-ui-eval resource/image/ports
